base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_menu_ascii_numeric — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Menu alphabet font — A-Z + 0-9. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Menu alphabet font — A-Z + 0-9; annotation notes: '♦ Arrow from American version. ♦♦ Arrows from Japanese version.'
